ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_sources" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media source */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the media source */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the media source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., politics, sports, entertainment) */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_themes" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "theme_relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the theme to the article (value between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaning_scores" (
  "leaning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaning score */,
  "leaning_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaning score (e.g., Left, Center, Right) */,
  "leaning_description" TEXT /* Description of the leaning score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_leaning" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "leaning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaning score */,
  "leaning_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the leaning score assignment (value between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "leaning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "author_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article (e.g., writer, editor, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment trend */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis scores (negative, neutral, positive, compound) */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme (optional) */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_frequency" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the theme */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_frequency_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_article" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication in the media source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_entities" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "entity_relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the entity to the article (value between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "entity_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each media source
Name of the theme (e.g., politics, sports, entertainment)
Relevance of the theme to the article (value between 0 and 1)
Unique identifier for each leaning score
Name of the leaning score (e.g., Left, Center, Right)
Confidence level of the leaning score assignment (value between 0 and 1)
Role of the author in the article (e.g., writer, editor, contributor)
Unique identifier for each sentiment trend
Sentiment analysis scores (negative, neutral, positive, compound)
Date of publication in the media source
Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location)
Relevance of the entity to the article (value between 0 and 1)
